calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN P. ZANGHI, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIF. CORP.;
LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY MARK MOYER, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT FAREED HASAN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

THE PARTIES PLACE A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS:
THE DEFENDANT WILL FORFEIT RENTAL AGREEMENT FOR 364 EDDY STREET, #214, SAN FRANCISCO, CA;
ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS ARE IN THE AMOUNT OF $273.50.

A STAY THROUGH MAR-01-06, WHEN THE DEFENDANT MUST VACATE THE PREMISE NO LATER THAN 2:00 P.M. ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT FAREED HASSAN FOLLOWS THE FOLLOWING DIRECTIVES:

WHILE DEFENDANT REMAINS IN POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, PROPER BEHAVIOR REQUIREMENTS IN THE RESIDENCE OF THE ELM HOTEL ARE IN EFFECT, AS FOLLOWS: NO PHYSICAL VIOLENCE; NO INTIMIDATING BEHAVIOR OR USE OF ANY OBSCENITIES; DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH ALL RULES OF THE ELM HOTEL; NO VISITATION OR ENTERTAINMENT OF ONE MS. JOANN LA GROAN. IF THERE IS NO COMPLIANCE OF THE ABOVE DIRECTIVES BY DEFENDANT FAREED HASSAN, PLAINTIFF WILL GIVE 48-HOUR WRITTEN NOTICE TO VACATE.
AS LONG AS DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THE TERMS OF THIS STIPULATION, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE UNPAID RENT AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES THROUGH THE DATE OF MAR-01-2006; IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THIS STIPULATION, PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE JUDGMENT. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SIGNED BY THE COURT WHO APPROVES THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM THOMAS MAXWELL; REPORTER JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218).
